examples: Heredity is not a factor in causing the cancer.
The moral characters of men are formed not by heredity but by environment.
If identical twins are more similar to each other with respect to an ailment than fraternal twins are, then vulnerability to the disease must be rooted at least in part in heredity.
That is why Darwin himself could credibly propose his theory while being completely ignorant of the mechanisms of heredity.
Zigta, for example, was recognised as a local leader, a rank that is conferred by ability rather than heredity in the Irob culture.
